title: Google Cloud’s Revenue Is Rocketing—but Costs of AI Expansion Are as Well
summary: Google Cloud’s business exploded in the second quarter, with revenue soaring 82%, nearly 20 percentage points faster than for the previous quarter. Google has been a cash machine almost since its founding, so burning cash is an unusual experience for the company.
